title: Resolution Extending Deep Sympathy and Condolences to the Family, Relatives and Friends of Former Sangguniang Barangay Kagawad of Barangay San Antonio Honorable Dominador Calpito, Who Joined His Maker Last May 27, 2021. (AUTHOR(S): Hon. Miko C. Pelegrina, Hon. Janos S. Lapiz, Hon. Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Hon. Mike Dexter A. Concio, Hon. Mark Lester B. Dizon, Hon. Rodora P. Loares, Hon. Jozylyn N. Manansala, 06/07/2021)
